case_title: DAVID DEL DEBBIO VS. TATIANA DUBROVINA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-01-2015 CONTINUED TO AUG-05-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 16213031)

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL DEBBIO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT DUBROVINA, TATIANA DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2015
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL DEBBIO, DAVID SERVED NOV-04-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DUBROVINA, TATIANA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE AUG-05-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2015 CONTINUED TO FEB-02-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT OR FILE NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY PER CRC 3.650. THE NOV-03-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 15295045) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL DEBBIO, DAVID
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 14356050) AS TO DEFENDANT DUBROVINA, TATIANA
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-02-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2016 CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT OR FILE NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY PER CRC 3.650. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-09-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
